name: Eltroxin / Thyronorm
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Synthetic T4 thyroid hormone that is converted to active T3 in peripheral tissues, restoring normal metabolic function.

serious: Adrenal crisis if started before cortisol replacement

food_interactions: Take 30–60 minutes before breakfast on empty stomach
Coffee and soy milk reduce absorption
what_to_avoid: Always take on empty stomach at the same time daily
storage: Store below 25°C, protect from light and moisture
